Off Calendar Dec-17-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. LEONOR NOGUEZ-WARD, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 554-3854 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. WILLIAM E. TAGGART, JR. OF TAGGART & HAWKINS, TEL. NO. (510) 893-9999 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT DUANE LEONARD.

RULING - JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. DEFENDANT DUANE LEONARD'S Motion For Declaration Renewal Of Judgment Is Void And Judgment Lien Is Not Enforceable IS DENIED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE MOVING PARTY IS NOT ENTITLED TO RELIEF UNDER CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 473 (D). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
